title: verbascum simplex subsp. hispanicum
intro: Verbascum simplex subsp. hispanicum, also known as the Spanish mullein or narrow-leaved mullein, is a subspecies of the Verbascum simplex plant, which is a biennial herb native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which can help to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The health benefits of Verbascum simplex subsp. hispanicum include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and soothing skin irritations. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
